steps.t: You have been assigned another important mission! Report to Ausma in Annâk-khurfu to learn the details.
Hórin has announced that he knows what the hobgoblins are planning. You should talk to Hórin in Annâk-khurfu.
The mission is complete! You should talk to Hórin in Annâk-khurfu.
The mission is complete! You should talk to Glóin in Annâk-khurfu.
